attributes.action: Follow Scotland. Provide free feminine products. End period poverty in Britain
attributes.additional_details: We do not get a choice in having periods. It's a biological inevitability for almost all women, and we should not have to pay for feminine products for something we do not get a choice in. Diabetics do not get a choice in needing their medications, and women do not get a choice in bleeding for 1 week in every 4. If Scotland can do it, we can do it. If we can do it, so can other countries. In Britain, i would like to think we are ahead of basic standards.
attributes.background: Scotland have recently made period products free for women. Women in the rest of Britain are still suffering period poverty and we want you to follow and do the same.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petitions, which call for similar action:

Fund and distribute first-period boxes through schools and healthcare settings
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/757823

Fund free female sanitary products for all women and girls
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/756958

Fund free female sanitary products in Public Restrooms
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/741219
